pages.raw_text:
To eliminate any danger Of the
city ever going in darkness, the
Washington Water Power Co. has
provided an elaborate system of
storage batteries to be thrown into
commission at any emergency.


The death Of Mrs. Samuel Green.
berg, wife of the Spokane business
man, occurred yesterday at Repub-
lie, Wash. The funeral will be held
here from the orthodox Jewish tenn
pie tomorrow at 10 o'clock.


In the offices Of Mayor Pratt yes.
terday j. b. Combs addressed the
campaign committee of the anti
tuberculosis fight that is to be made
in this city the week beginning
April 25.


The jury in the murder case
against Sim Lewis yesterday re-
turned verdict of manslaugbter
with the recommendation that the
very llghtest sentence be imposed
